page_content:
COMM488 Communication Portfolio Project (1 Credit)

Preparation of the professional communication portfolio.

Restriction: Senior standing; and must be in Communication program. Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.

COMM489 Topical Research (1-3 Credits)

Individualized research projects conducted with a faculty sponsor. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Communication department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
